{{CargoClone
|name=Plague Apostle Sigma
|rank=red
|cabin=1
|id=1008
|gene1={race} HARD +50
|gene2={race} AFFCT +50
|gene3=Resolver: W-tads extracted +15
|gene4=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Gene Research SPD +0.6%
|gene6=Per 60 Minions in battle:
> Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Gene Research SPD +1%
|}}
